summary: Iteration 117: Purchasing Requisition Engine, BEO Creation from Menu Builder, Group Resume PDF Export - All features tested and working. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All panels verified working after fixing Purchasing module export issue.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed Purchasing module export - index.ts was exporting old OptimizedOrderPanel instead of new PurchasingPanel
Purchasing Engine connects 21-day forecast covers → recipe ingredients → prep list with 34 ingredients totaling ~$746
Prep list shows outlet breakdown (Signature Italian, Rooftop Lounge, Pool Bar & Grill, Family Dining)
Dashboard shows 7-day projected food cost chart with daily projections
BEO creation from Menu Builder calculates financial breakdown with service charge (26%) and tax (7%)
BEO templates support save/load/delete with use_count tracking
Group Resume PDF export uses fpdf2 library with proper Content-Type: application/pdf header
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Group Resume sample seeded via POST /api/group-resume/seed-sample (eClinical Works Enterprise Summit). Purchasing prep list uses OUTLET_MENU_MIX and INGREDIENT_YIELDS data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 117 tested Purchasing Requisition Engine (Financial & Purchasing > Purchasing Engine), BEO Menu Builder (Culinary Operations > BEO Menu Builder), and Group Resume PDF Export (Events & Catering > Group Resume). Fixed Purchasing module export issue - renamed index.tsx to PurchasingPanel.tsx and updated index.ts to export it. All backend APIs working. Purchasing Engine has 3 tabs: Dashboard (7-day food cost chart), Prep List (34 ingredients with shortage alerts), Requisitions (PR list with approve workflow). BEO Menu Builder has Save Template and Create BEO buttons when items selected. Group Resume has Export PDF button that generates PDF with all sections.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/purchasing/prep-list?date=2026-04-13 - returns 34 ingredients with total cost $746.06 - PASSED
GET /api/purchasing/prep-list?date=2026-04-13&outlet=Pool%20Bar%20%26%20Grill - returns Pool Bar only items - PASSED
GET /api/purchasing/dashboard - returns weekly_projected_cost, daily_projections (7 days), outlets_tracked - PASSED
POST /api/purchasing/requisition - creates PR with pr- prefix ID - PASSED
POST /api/banquet-menus/create-beo - creates BEO with financial breakdown - PASSED
POST /api/group-resume/seed-sample - seeds eClinical Works resume - PASSED
GET /api/group-resume/gr-eclinical-sample/pdf - returns PDF binary with application/pdf content type - PASSED
GET /api/group-resume/gr-eclinical-sample - returns all sections (VIPs, room blocks, schedule) - PASSED

Panel has 3 tabs: Dashboard, Prep List, Requisitions - PASSED

Dashboard shows 4 outlets tracked, 10 items with recipes, pending PRs count - PASSED
Prep List shows 34 ingredients totaling $746.06 with 34 shortages - PASSED
Prep List has date picker, outlet selector, Generate button - PASSED
Create PR button visible and creates requisition - PASSED
Requisitions view shows PR list with PENDING/APPROVED status - PASSED
BEO Menu Builder panel opens via Culinary Operations > BEO Menu Builder - PASSED
Category sidebar shows BREAKFAST, BREAKS, LUNCH, DINNER, RECEPTION, BEVERAGE, ADD-ONS - PASSED
Available items panel shows menu items with dietary info - PASSED
Selected items panel shows items with quantity controls - PASSED
Save Template button visible when items selected - PASSED
Create BEO button visible when items selected - PASSED
Cost breakdown shows per-person, F&B total, service charge, tax, grand total - PASSED
Group Resume Builder panel opens via Events & Catering > Group Resume - PASSED
Resume list shows eClinical Works sample with CONFIRMED status - PASSED
Resume detail shows all sections: Meeting Details, VIP Info, Room Blocks - PASSED
Export PDF button visible in resume detail view - PASSED

features: Financial breakdown with service charge and tax

bug_fixed.issue: Purchasing Requisition Engine panel showed 'Panel failed to render - useState is not defined'
bug_fixed.root_cause: index.ts was exporting OptimizedOrderPanel instead of the new PurchasingPanel component
bug_fixed.fix: Renamed index.tsx to PurchasingPanel.tsx and updated index.ts to export from './PurchasingPanel'

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations. Purchasing Engine uses hardcoded OUTLET_MENU_MIX and INGREDIENT_YIELDS data.
